message:
fix: add retry logic to SetAgentState and CreateOrReopenAgentBead (gt-94llt7)

These two critical Dolt operations during polecat spawn failed silently with
warn-only error handling, unlike hook updates which had 3-retry backoff.

Changes:
- Add createAgentBeadWithRetry: 3 retries with 500ms exponential backoff,
  fails hard when Dolt exists but write fails (untrackable polecat is worse
  than no polecat), graceful when beads not configured (test envs)
- Add SetAgentStateWithRetry: same retry pattern for state transitions
- Add CheckDoltHealth: pre-spawn health check prevents orphaned polecats
  when Dolt is down
- AddWithOptions and RepairWorktreeWithOptions now clean up on agent bead
  creation failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
